questions.question: Explain the concept of Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) and its importance in software project management. (10 marks)
What is the difference between a Work Package and a Task in a project management context? Provide an example to illustrate your answer. (10 marks)
Describe the role of risk management in software project planning and execution. What are the key steps involved in identifying, assessing, and mitigating risks? (20 marks)
